member.name: T:JJAS_ISBST.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:JJAS_ISBST.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:JJAS_ISBST.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:JJAS_ISBST.My.Resources.Resources._new
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: T:JJAS_ISBST.Db
member.summary: Small ADO.NET helper to reduce duplication and standardize safe DB calls. Prefer repositories/services over writing SQL in Forms.

member.name: M:JJAS_ISBST.ImageLoader.AddAndLoadImages(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a DataColumn (Image) and loads images from ImagePath into memory. Safe: uses Bitmap copy to avoid locking files.

member.name: M:JJAS_ISBST.Module1.reload(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Legacy grid reloader. Prefer repositories + data binding.
